title: Racosperma hemignostum

intro: Racosperma hemignostum, also known as the Silver Wattle or Acacia dealbata, is a small to medium-sized tree native to Australia, characterized by its white or cream-colored flowers and silver-gray foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, providing relief from symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, while also exhibiting antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects.
